title: Phyllorkis ovalifolia
taxonomy: Phyllorkis ovalifolia is a species of orchid in the family Orchidaceae. It belongs to the subfamily Orchidoideae and is part of the tribe Coelogyneae. The genus Phyllorkis is often included in the genus Pseudocordyline, but some sources still recognize it as a distinct genus. Within the Orchidaceae family, Phyllorkis ovalifolia is also classified as being in the subfamily Orchidoideae. This classification helps in the identification and categorization of the plant's characteristics and growth patterns.
